$comment: Design token file for the Carousel Empty Container component
$description: Content-slot placeholder rendered inside the carousel viewport when no slide content is provided. Displays a centered 'Custom Slot' label on a muted gray background. The container stretches to fill the full carousel content area — its width is not fixed and adapts to the carousel width.

background.description: #eaecf0 — muted gray fill used as the empty-state placeholder background

vertical.description: 8px top and bottom inset inside the empty container

color.description: #d0d5dd — very light gray for the placeholder label, blending into the gray background
